source: Bootstrap ZIP3 → Alabama county FIPS map. Used until full HUD USPS ZIP-COUNTY Q1 2025 crosswalk is loaded in next session.
_notes: ZIP3-only fallback works because ZIP first-3 generally maps to a single county or sectional center. For groups with members in non-AL ZIPs, the engine falls back to national means until the full HUD crosswalk is loaded.
The full HUD USPS ZIP-COUNTY Q1 2025 release (~3 MB JSON when compiled) will replace this bootstrap in the next session — same JSON shape, same engine, no code changes required.
